31.gl: to strike (lightly or severely, literally or figuratively)
31.kj: beat, cast forth, clap, give (wounds), [idiom] go forward, [idiom] indeed, kill, make (slaughter), murderer, punish, slaughter, slay(-er, -ing), smite(-r, -ing), strike, be stricke
[phrase] fork, [phrase] often(-times), third, thir(-teen, -teenth), three, [phrase] thrice. Compare H7991 (שָׁלִישׁ).
31.dv: or שָׁלֹשׁ; masculine שְׁלוֹשָׁה; or שְׁלֹשָׁה; a primitive number;

31.gl: Binjamin, youngest son of Jacob; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory
31.dv: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H3225 (יָמִין); son of (the) right hand;

31.gl: a hundred; also as a multiplicative and a fraction
31.dv: or מֵאיָה; properly, a primitive numeral

32.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative
32.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

32.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
32.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
32.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

32.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
32.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

32.gl: to be (causative, make) luminous (literally and metaphorically)
32.kj: [idiom] break of day, glorious, kindle, (be, en-, give, show) light (-en, -ened), set on fire, shine.

32.gl: father, in a literal and immediate, or figurative and remote application
32.kj: chief, (fore-) father(-less), [idiom] patrimony, principal. Compare names in 'Abi-'.

32.gl: properly, a twist (away of the light), i.e. night; figuratively, adversity
32.dv: or (Isaiah 21:11) לֵיל; also לַיְלָה; from the same as H3883 (לוּל);
